name: QA 1992
description:
PCP QA Test No. 1992

Exercise the uwsgi PMDA - install, remove and values.



Copyright (c) 2024 Nikhil Jain <nikjain@redhat.com>.  All Rights Reserved.



**To reproduce this test, please run:**

    build/ci/ci-run.py centos7-container reproduce
descriptionHtml:
PCP QA Test No. 1992

Exercise the uwsgi PMDA - install, remove and values.

Copyright (c) 2024 Nikhil Jain nikjain@redhat.com. All Rights Reserved.

To reproduce this test, please run:

build/ci/ci-run.py centos7-container reproduce
statusMessage:
output mismatch (see 1992.out.bad)
7,11c7,11
< Updating the Performance Metrics Name Space (PMNS) ...
< Terminate PMDA if already installed ...
< [...install files, make output...]
< Updating the PMCD control file, and notifying PMCD ...
< Check uwsgi metrics have appeared ... X metrics and Y values
---
> Traceback (most recent call last):
>  File "$PCP_VAR_DIR/pmdas/uwsgi/pmdauwsgi.python", line 46, in <module>
>  import requests
> ModuleNotFoundError: No module named 'requests'
> Arrgh! failed to create $PCP_VAR_DIR/pmdas/uwsgi/domain.h.python from /var/lib/pcp/pmdas/uwsgi/pmdauwsgi.python
17,21c17
< Culling the Performance Metrics Name Space ...
< uwsgi ... done
< Updating the PMCD control file, and notifying PMCD ...
< [...removing files...]
< Check uwsgi metrics have gone away ... OK
---
> Remove: cannot determine the Performance Metrics Domain from domain.h.python
Check local PMCD is still alive ...
